description_long: This motorcycle features a classic scrambler design with a blue fuel tank accented by metallic details and a brown, ribbed leather seat. The frame and wheels are predominantly black, with spoked rims and dual shock absorbers at the rear. The front and rear fenders are metallic gray, complementing the overall vintage aesthetic. The engine is exposed, with visible cooling fins and a black exhaust system running along the side. The handlebars are upright and wide, equipped with standard controls and round mirrors. The motorcycle has a compact, rugged build suitable for both urban commuting and light off-road use.
description: A vintage-style blue scrambler motorcycle with a brown leather seat, black spoked wheels, and metallic fenders. It has a rugged, classic look with exposed engine and upright handlebars.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue fuel tank, brown seat, black spoked wheels, and engine details.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the brown seat, rear fender, and dual shock absorbers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, showing the exhaust and engine from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the upright handlebars, round headlight, and front fender.
